utility_evaluation.REASONING:

2. travel_dates: present and fully specified (2024-10-15 to 2024-10-19) ✅
3. transportation: includes flight details (airline, class, airports, baggage, cost, currency) ✅
4. accommodation: includes hotel details with name, type, rating, cost, amenities ✅
5. activities: includes names, costs, difficulty, transport, guide ✅

All 7 items are present and fully specified.
